title: Simple trapezoidal channel — ramp Q, friction-slope DS (Chunk 1 transient)

parity_program.notes: Q ramp 100→200→100 cfs over 48 hr; DS type 2 friction slope. HEC-RAS Plan 04 HDF; STREAM-1D verify PASS (max |Δ| ≈ 0.002 ft at 32 checkpoints).

scope.notes: Same 4-XS geometry as simple_channel; slow upstream Q transient.

linked_project.notes: Generate u04/p04 via scripts/write_simple_channel_ramp.py; stage with chunk1_simple_channel_ramp_prep.py.

stream1d.notes: g01 geometry; u04 ramp Q(t)+friction-slope DS (type 2); steady warm-start IC @ Q=100; theta=1.

reference.notes: HEC-RAS Plan 04 HDF; refresh via chunk1_simple_channel_ramp_capture.py.
